sections.heading: Organizational Health Score
sections.template:
Current Score: {health_score}/100 ({health_trend} from last week)

The organizational health score reflects the aggregate cybersecurity behavioral posture across all monitored units. A score above 80 indicates stable security culture. Below 60 warrants executive attention.
